{"query":"Elon Musk Vivek Ramaswamy Ohio governor campaign donation amount filing source","model":"mako","response_time_ms":1098,"verdict":null,"extra_info":null,"results":[{"url":"https://www.13abc.com/2026/07/16/elon-musk-spends-5-million-support-vivek-ramaswamys-bid-become-ohios-next-governor/","title":"Elon Musk spends $5 million to support Vivek Ramaswamy’s bid to become Ohio’s next governor","content":"His donation went to V-Pac: Victors Not Victims, a super PAC supporting Ramaswamy.
The filing also revealed sizable donations from other billionaires.
Musk and Ramaswamy were supposed to co-lead the Department of Government Efficiency at the start of President Donald Trump’s second term.
Musk said in February 2025 that Ramaswamy has his full endorsement."},{"url":"https://www.businessinsider.com/elon-musk-donates-5-million-to-support-ramaswamys-ohio-campaign-2026-7","title":"Elon Musk Donates $5 Million to Support Ramaswamy's Ohio Campaign - Business Insider","content":"2 days ago — Elon Musk backs Vivek Ramaswamy for Ohio governor, donating $5 million to a super PAC, after their abrupt DOGE split last year.
Elon Musk puts $5 million behind Vivek Ramaswamy's run for governor after their abrupt DOGE split
Elon Musk is backing his former DOGE partner Vivek Ramaswamy's run for governor in Ohio.
The SpaceX billionaire donated $5 million in May to a super PAC supporting Ramaswamy, according to a campaign finance filing published Wednesday.
Months later, the day of Trump's inauguration, Ramaswamy announced he was leaving DOGE, with media reports citing clashes between him and Musk.
Shortly after, Ramaswamy announced he was running for governor of Ohio, with both Musk and Trump endorsing him in social media posts.
He's up against Democratic candidate Amy Acton, a former state health official, in what's considered a close race.
After stepping away from DOGE in May 2025, Musk said he would pull back on political spending, though that proved short-lived."},{"url":"https://americanbazaaronline.com/2026/07/16/elon-musk-donates-5-million-to-support-vivek-ramaswamys-bid-for-ohio-governor-484674/","title":"Elon Musk donates $5 million to support Vivek Ramaswamy’s bid","content":"1 day ago — Elon Musk has donated $5 million to support Vivek Ramaswamy's campaign for Ohio governor, adding a major financial boost to the Republican.
Elon Musk donates $5 million to support Vivek Ramaswamy’s bid for Ohio governor
The funds were directed to Victors, Not Victims (V-PAC), the chief political action committee backing Ramaswamy’s gubernatorial campaign.
As per Federal Election Commission (FEC) filings, Musk also contributed less than $500,000 to America PAC that he founded in July 2024.
Musk’s contribution comes after having previously teamed up with Ramaswamy, right after Donald Trump’s 2024 presidential win to launch the Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE) with a big promise to cut government spending, modernize outdated systems and clear out unnecessary red tape across federal agencies.
The partnership ended in 2025 with Musk exiting DOGE despite its original expiration being July 2026.
Campaigned on few core promises: limited government, supporting business- friendly policies and pushing for more innovation.
According to AdImpact, Musk has given roughly $50 million to America PAC in 2025-26 but it hasn’t spent any money on advertising this year yet.
Later Morris withdrew from race in May as trump urged him to step aside.
After the election, Musk also pledged that America PAC would continue operating beyond the campaign."},{"url":"https://www.cleveland.com/politics/2026/07/musk-gave-5-million-to-back-ramaswamy-heres-where-else-his-2026-political-money-went.html","title":"Where else Elon Musk's political money went in 2026","date":"4 hours ago","content":"4 hours ago — Elon Musk's $5 million contribution supporting Vivek Ramaswamy was part of at least $17.6 million in political spending attributed to him in ..."}]}
